description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per Shopify top-level resource (products / orders / customers / inventory_items / discount_codes / draft_orders / collections / checkouts / abandoned_checkouts / fulfillments / gift_cards / locations / price_rules / shipping_zones). Materializing runs a paginated REST list call for the resource against the configured store.

shop_env_var.label: Shop Env Var
shop_env_var.description: Env var with the shop domain (e.g. mystore.myshopify.com).

access_token_env_var.label: Access Token Env Var
access_token_env_var.description: Env var with a custom-app access token (X-Shopify-Access-Token).

resource_selector.label: Resource Selector
resource_selector.description: Fivetran-shape selector filtering which Shopify resources become assets.
